all.en: This memorandum summarizes the due diligence findings for the proposed acquisition of Larksen Robotics.
all.zh: 本備忘錄摘述對 Larksen Robotics 擬議併購案的盡職調查結果。

all.en: The review covered financial, legal, operational, and technology workstreams.
all.zh: 審查涵蓋財務、法律、營運及技術等工作流。

all.en: External advisors supported the buy-side team across each functional area.
all.zh: 外部顧問在各功能領域支援收購方團隊。

all.en: Larksen reported revenue of 156 million dollars in the most recent fiscal year.
all.zh: Larksen 在最近一個會計年度報告營收為一億五千六百萬美元。

all.en: Adjusted EBITDA margin stood at 18 percent, in line with management estimates.
all.zh: 調整後 EBITDA 利潤率為百分之十八，與管理層估計一致。

all.en: Quality of earnings analysis identified 2.4 million dollars of one-time benefits.
all.zh: 盈餘品質分析辨識出兩百四十萬美元的一次性利益。

all.en: Customer concentration is moderate, with the top five clients representing 28 percent of sales.
all.zh: 客戶集中度屬中等，前五大客戶佔銷售百分之二十八。

all.en: Recurring service contracts provide an attractive base of predictable revenue.
all.zh: 經常性服務合約提供可預期營收的吸引基礎。

all.en: Working capital appears appropriately managed for the current scale of operations.
all.zh: 以目前營運規模而言，營運資金管理尚屬妥適。

all.en: Outstanding indebtedness totals 22 million dollars with no near-term refinancing risk.
all.zh: 未償債務總計兩千兩百萬美元，無近期再融資風險。

all.en: The legal review identified no material litigation currently pending against the target.
all.zh: 法律審查未發現目標公司目前有任何重大未決訴訟。

all.en: Several commercial agreements contain change of control clauses requiring counterparty consent.
all.zh: 數份商業合約含有控制權變更條款，須取得交易對手同意。

all.en: Intellectual property is appropriately registered, though some trademarks need renewal.
all.zh: 智慧財產登記情形得宜，但部分商標需辦理更新。

all.en: Source code repositories were reviewed and meet industry security benchmarks.
all.zh: 已審視原始碼存放庫，符合產業資安標竿。

all.en: Employee retention is a key risk, especially within the core engineering team.
all.zh: 員工留任是關鍵風險，特別是核心工程團隊。

all.en: We recommend retention packages for fifteen identified critical personnel.
all.zh: 我們建議為已辨識的十五位關鍵人員提供留任獎金方案。

all.en: Operationally, the company runs three facilities with utilization near 78 percent.
all.zh: 營運方面，公司營運三座廠房，產能利用率接近百分之七十八。

all.en: Cost synergies of 9 to 12 million dollars annually appear achievable within 24 months.
all.zh: 年化九百萬至一千兩百萬美元的成本綜效，預計可於二十四個月內達成。

all.en: Revenue synergies will depend on successful cross-selling into our installed base.
all.zh: 營收綜效將取決於能否成功向既有客戶交叉銷售。

all.en: Integration costs are estimated at 14 million dollars over the first 18 months.
all.zh: 前十八個月的整合成本估計為一千四百萬美元。

all.en: Cyber and data privacy diligence revealed minor gaps that are readily remediable.
all.zh: 資安與資料隱私調查發現的輕微缺口可迅速補強。

all.en: Tax structure of the proposed transaction has been reviewed by both internal and external counsel.
all.zh: 擬議交易的稅務架構已由內外部顧問共同檢視。

all.en: On balance, the team views the opportunity as financially and strategically attractive.
all.zh: 綜合而言，團隊認為此機會在財務與策略上均具吸引力。

all.en: We recommend proceeding to negotiation of definitive agreements, subject to final pricing.
all.zh: 建議在最終定價確認後，進入正式合約的談判階段。

all.en: The preliminary purchase price range is between 240 and 265 million dollars on a cash-free basis.
all.zh: 初步收購價格區間為兩億四千萬至兩億六千五百萬美元，以無現金基礎計算。

all.en: We propose a deferred consideration mechanism tied to earn-out targets over two years.
all.zh: 我們建議採用與兩年期業績獎酬目標連動的遞延對價機制。

all.en: Representations and warranties insurance should be secured before signing the agreement.
all.zh: 應於簽約前取得陳述與保證保險。

all.en: A reverse termination fee of 3 percent will be requested to provide deal certainty.
all.zh: 將要求百分之三的反向終止費，以提供交易確定性。

all.en: Antitrust filings will be required in the United States, the European Union, and Japan.
all.zh: 需於美國、歐盟及日本辦理反壟斷申報。

all.en: Closing is anticipated within four to six months following the signing of definitive documents.
all.zh: 預計於正式合約簽署後四至六個月內完成交割。

all.en: An integration management office should be established prior to the announcement of the deal.
all.zh: 應於交易公告前設立整合管理辦公室。

all.en: Day-one communications must address concerns from employees, customers, and key suppliers.
all.zh: 交割首日溝通須處理員工、客戶及關鍵供應商的疑慮。

all.en: The board will be asked to approve the transaction at the next regularly scheduled meeting.
all.zh: 將於下次例行會議請董事會核准本交易。

all.en: We thank all workstream leads for their diligent efforts throughout this evaluation process.
all.zh: 感謝所有工作流主管於本次評估過程中的努力與付出。
